identity.tone: Elite Athleticism x Swiss Financial Precision
core_principles: Density: High data density (Financials) vs. Big Bold Impact (KPIs)
Contrast: Deep Obsidian backgrounds vs. Electric Signal colors
Asymmetry: Tension in layout, never boring center-alignment

headings.notes: Use for Page Titles, KPI Values, and Section Headers. DO NOT use Inter.

body.notes: Use for all labels, descriptions, and table data.

data_tables.notes: All financial numbers in tables must be monospaced for alignment.

rules: NO GRADIENTS on text or buttons. Flat, bold colors only.
Backgrounds should be matte dark (#09090B), not pitch black.
Use 1px borders (white/10) to define areas instead of shadows.

primary.class: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines where possible. Tooltips must be dark with high contrast.

tables.style: Compact. Row hover effects enabled. Header uppercase and muted.

textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background to reduce digital sterility.
Use 'Scanline' effect on specific data panels (optional).

icons.size: w-5 h-5 for UI, w-8 h-8 for KPI icons

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract gym interior for subtle texture overlay

placeholders.description: Silhouette athlete for empty states or loading

do_not: DO NOT use gradients for text.
DO NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Keep it sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md/sm).
DO NOT center align text in KPI cards. Left align always.
must_do: MUST use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings.
MUST use 'fr-CH' formatting for all currency (10'000.00 CHF).
MUST include data-testid on all interactive elements.
MUST implement the Language Switcher (FR/EN) in the top nav.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Fonts: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.
2. Configure Tailwind: Update tailwind.config.js to use these fonts and the custom color palette.
3. Build Layout: Create a persistent Sidebar layout with a Topbar for the Language Switcher.
4. Dashboard: Implement the 4-tab system (Revenue, Funnel, Members, Metrics) using Shadcn Tabs.
5. Components: Customize Shadcn Card, Table, and Button to match the 'Sharp/Dark' aesthetic.
6. Charts: Use Recharts with the defined color palette. Ensure tooltips are styled.
7. Transactions: Build the CRUD table with filtering and category management.
8. Localization: Create a simple context or hook for managing FR/EN strings.
